ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Downtime Notice
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN servers will undergo routine maintenance on Friday, 15th June from 01:00 AM to 04:00 AM GMT. During this window, VPN access may be temporarily unavailable. We recommend planning your remote work accordingly.

If you experience any connectivity issues outside of this maintenance period, please contact IT Support at support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Payroll Information Updated
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our records indicate that your payroll information was recently updated by the HR department. To ensure uninterrupted salary processing, please confirm the accuracy of the new details by visiting the secure portal within the next 48 hours.

Failure to verify these details may result in a temporary suspension of your payroll account, affecting future payments.

Click the link below to review and confirm your information:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Human Resources Team
HR Department
